name: Healing Word
desc: Heal a unit at range.

name: RangedHeal2
desc: Heal other units in an area at range.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: Heal an adjacent unit.

name: MeleeHeal2
desc: Heal all adjacent units.

name: Malaise
desc: Inflict Weakness on units in an area.

name: Malaise2
desc: Inflict Weakness and Poison on units in an area.

name: Open Wounds
desc:
A spell that deals more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]

name: OpenWounds2
desc:
A spell that deals even more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]

name: Prayer
desc: Heal units in an area.

name: Prayer2
desc: Heal units in a larger area. Infinite range.

name: Convert
desc: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit.

name: Convert2
desc: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit. Non-boss enemies with less than 25% health join your party.

name: Cleanse
desc: Remove all debuffs from a unit.

name: Cleanse2
desc: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.

name: Purge
desc: Remove all buffs from a unit.

name: Purge2
desc: Remove all buffs from a unit. Deal 3 damage to that unit for each unique status effect removed.

name: Heretic Mark
desc: Inflict Ostracized 2 on a unit.

name: HereticMark2
desc: Inflict Ostracized 4 on a unit.

name: Zealot
desc: Gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: Zealot2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:divineshield].
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Haste
desc: Give a unit +10 [img:spd] until the end of its next turn.

name: Haste2
desc: Give units in an area +10 [img:spd] until the end of their next turns.

name: Rally
desc: Force a unit to attack one of its enemies.

name: Rally2
desc: Force units in an area to each attack one of their enemies.

name: Buddy Up
desc: Jump to an open tile next to an ally.

name: BuddyUp2
desc:
Jump to an open tile next to an ally.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Healing Fall
desc: Jump to an open tile, then heal each adjacent unit.

name: HealingFall2
desc:
Jump to an open tile, then heal each adjacent unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Holy Dash
desc: Dash forward, heal a unit and give it a random stat up.

name: RallyCharge2
desc: Dash forward, heal a unit and give it 3 random stat ups.

name: Reverse Damage
desc: Reverse the last damage an adjacent unit took.

name: ReverseDamage2
desc: Reverse the last damage a unit within range took.

name: Rebuke
desc: Deal damage to a unit equal to the damage that unit last dealt.

name: Rebuke2
desc: Deal damage to a unit equal to twice the damage that unit last dealt.

name: Wish
desc:
Target an area. At the beginning of your next turn, heal all units in that area.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Wish2
desc:
Target an area. At the beginning of your next turn, heal all units in that area. This spell tracks its target if you directly targeted a unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Witch Hunt
desc: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.

name: WitchHunt2
desc:
Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Friend or Foe
desc: A ranged spell that heals allies and damages enemies.

name: FriendOrFoe2
desc: An infinitely ranged spell that heals allies and damages enemies.

name: Revive
desc: Revive a body to 50% HP and cure one of its injuries.

name: Revive2
desc: Revive a body to 100% HP and cure one of its injuries. If it was an enemy, it gets charmed.

name: Holy Light
desc: Heal allies and damage enemies in an area. This spell has half effect outside its center.

name: HolyLight2
desc:
Heal allies and damage enemies in an area. This spell has half effect outside its center.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Ethereal
desc: Gain 4 [img:divineshield], 3 [img:shield], heal 2 HP, and Brace 1.

name: Ethereal2
desc:
Gain Thorns 6, Reflect 5, 4 [img:divineshield],
3 [img:shield], heal 2 HP and Brace 1.

name: Born Again
desc: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up, then you fall asleep.

name: Born Again
desc: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up.

name: Benediction
desc: Heal EVERYTHING for 2 HP.

name: Benediction2
desc:
Heal EVERYTHING for 2 HP.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Crusade
desc: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy.

name: Crusade2
desc: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy and gain +1 [img:str].

name: Hallowed Ground
desc: Spawn a blessing pickup on an empty tile in range.

name: HallowedGround2
desc: Spawn a blessing pickup on any empty tile.

name: Enlighten
desc: Another unit's next spell is free.

name: Enlighten2
desc:
Another unit's next spell is free. Infinite range.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Anoint
desc: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to a random stat to an adjacent unit.

name: Anoint2
desc: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to 2 random stats to any unit.

name: An Eye for an Eye
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Blind 5 and Bleed 1.

name: EyeForAnEye2
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Blind 5, Bleed 1, and Madness 1.

name: Wrath of God
desc: Deal holy damage and inflict Blind to everything except for a safe circle around you. This vaporizes units it kills.

name: WrathOfGod2
desc: Deal holy damage and inflict Blind to all enemies. This vaporizes units it kills.

name: Adoubment
desc:
Heal a unit and remove its debuffs. That unit gets +1 to a random stat and becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range and must target it.

name: Adoubement2
desc:
Heal or revive a unit and remove its debuffs. That unit gets +1 to 3 random stats and becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range and must target it.

name: Divine Protection
desc:
Give a unit +1 [img:divineshield] and +1 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

name: DivineProtection2
desc:
Give a unit anywhere +1 [img:divineshield] and +2 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

name: Chosen Warrior
desc:
Give a unit +1 Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.

name: ChosenWarrior2
desc:
Give a unit +1 Damage and +1 Magic Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Swift Servant
desc:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

name: SwiftSanctify2
desc:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range, costs less and must target it, and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

name: Divine Gift
desc:
Gain All Stats Up. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: DivineGift2
desc:
Gain All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield]. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Holy Weapon
desc:
A dash attack with range, damage, and knockback equal to the amount of HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: HolyWeapon2
desc:
A dash attack with range, damage, and knockback equal to twice the amount of HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Stand In
desc:
Swap positions with any unit. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it.

name: GetDown2
desc:
Swap positions with any unit and heal it by 1 HP. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it.

name: Awaken
desc: Revive a body to 1 HP.

name: Awaken2
desc: Revive a body to 1 HP. Give that unit +1 [img:divineshield] and All Stats Up.

name: Fury Heal
desc: Heal an adjacent unit 2 to 6 times.

name: Baptism2
desc: Heal an adjacent unit 2 to 6 times. Each heal gives +1 to a random stat.

name: Pray
desc: Give another unit +5 [img:lck] until the end of its next turn.

name: Pray
desc: Give allies +5 [img:lck] and enemies -5 [img:lck] until the end of their next turns, in an area.

name: Emergency
desc: Run next to the ally with the most missing health. Trample all in the way.

name: Emergency2
desc:
Run next to the ally with the most missing health. Trample all in the way.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Guardian Angel
desc:
Make a unit The Alpha.
Bonus Passive: The Alpha has +50% dodge chance.

name: GuardianAngel2
desc:
Make a unit anywhere The Alpha.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
Bonus Passive: The Alpha has +50% dodge chance.

name: Booster
desc: Heal an adjacent unit. Excess healing is converted to an equal amount of random stat ups.

name: Booster2
desc: Heal a unit at range. Excess healing is converted to an equal amount of random stat ups.

name: Stimulants
desc: You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd].

name: Stimulants2
desc: You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd] and +1 [img:int].

name: Blinding Lights
desc: Inflict Blind 1 on each unit in an area.

name: BlindingLight2
desc: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit in a larger area.

name: Circle of Protection
desc: Give +1 [img:divineshield] to each unit within 2 tiles of you.

name: CircleOfProtection2
desc:
Give +1 [img:divineshield] and +1 Health Regeneration to each unit within 2 tiles of you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Call Over
desc: Make an ally move toward you.

name: CallOver2
desc: Make an ally move toward you. Infinite range.

name: Grace
desc: You or an adjacent unit gains a random positive effect.

name: Grace
desc: You or an adjacent unit heals a random amount of HP, gains +1 to a random stat, and gains a random positive effect.

name: Turn Foe
desc: Force a nearby unit to move away from you.

name: TurnFoe2
desc: Force a nearby unit to move away from you. If it was an enemy, inflict Madness 1 and Confusion 1.

name: Healing Salve
desc: You or an adjacent unit gains +1 Health Regeneration.

name: HealingSalve2
desc: You or an adjacent unit gains +2 Health Regeneration.
